content_body:
Rekindle your relationship with a weekend getaway to the North Georgia Mountains! Whether you're celebrating your anniversary, birthday, or engagement or just need time away from the hustle and bustle, Blue Ridge is the perfect place for couples to spend some quality time together.  Here are a few suggestions to build that bonding experience with your significant other in the beautiful North Georgia Mountains:

Romantic Cabins in Blue Ridge

First Day:

We all know that any trip over an hour in the car tends to lead to conversations that we otherwise wouldn’t have. As you and your loved one arrive in Blue Ridge, head straight to your luxury cabin (Cohutta Sunset, Cherokee Sunrise, and Aska Escape Lodge are just a few of our favorite romantic cabins) and check in to your home away from home.

After settling in, get a pizza to-go from Mystic Mountain Pizza and spend the evening cuddling by a fire and watching a movie. From there, top off the evening by soaking away your cares in the hot tub.

Romantic Things to do Blue Ridge GA for Couples

Second Day:

Waking up refreshed and ready to share experiences with your partner, start your day off with a refreshing coffee creation from Mountain Mama's Lounge! Their syrups and baked goods are all fresh and homemade, so enjoy a peaceful ambiance and some refreshments before enjoying the rest of your day.

For those who seek some adventure, take a zip-lining tour with Blue Ridge Zip Line Canopy Tours; adrenaline excursions always have a way of bringing out the best in us! Maybe even conquer a little fear or share a learning opportunity together. 

For a fresh meal to close out your day, visit Poke Jon's for a poke bowls made with the fresh ingredients. While there, enjoy the hip environment while savoring your food (and perhaps a craft cocktail from their speakeasy—Sake Jon's). 

Afterwards, stroll over to Copper Fox Books and browse their selection of handpicked books and rent one of their board games to play in The Loft!

Looking for a cozy night in? Enjoy some card or board games at one of the game tables in our luxury cabins. Our homes are stocked with a variety of options, so break out the laughs and competitive spirit during your North Georgia!

Third-Day:

Spend the day reveling in the relaxing pace of Blue Ridge, and treat yourselves to a couples massage at Serenity in the Mountains! Ranging from 55 minutes to 85 minutes, enjoy a hot stone massage to help your tense muscles and damaged tissues ease throughout your body.

Now that your soul has been nourished feed your body with Rum Cake Lady's fresh hot sandwiches! An authentic Cuban cafe, Rum Cake Lady is family-owned and operated, offering a variety of sandwiches, bowls, and homemade bundt cakes.

Spend the rest of the afternoon perusing the boutique shops on Main Street, and make sure to pick up a sweet treat for later from The Sweet Shoppe! Winning Cupcake Wars on Food Network, their shop, is a must on any Blue Ridge bucket list.

To cap off your final evening in the North Georgia Mountains, reserve a table at Ferraro's Kitchen for a divine, high-quality dinner. Their outstanding Italian food, cocktails, and wine list will leave you remembering this evening for years to come.

Fourth Day:

No North Georgia getaway would be complete without seeing the natural beauty of the mountains, so visiting The Swinging Bridge or Fall Branch Falls is a must! Only 25 minutes from Downtown Blue Ridge, The Swinging Bridge is a 270-foot-long suspension bridge perched over the Toccoa River. This classic hike is quite easy, with only a few hills to climb.

Fall Branch Falls is poised right in the heart of the Aska Adventure Area and offers stunning views, a pool at the base of the waterfall to splash around in, and the opportunity to walk to the top of the falls!

After your outdoorsy afternoon, stop by Bear Claw Vineyards for some fine wine, charcuterie, and live music! Their rustic property and venue boast a fully functioning winery and the opportunity to recap your adventures with your loved one while enjoying one last hurrah in Blue Ridge. 

Fifth Day: 

Though the road trip home is inevitable, Cabin Rentals of Georgia offers a late check-out service of $50/hour after 10 a.m., so treat yourself to sleeping in one more time before heading back to the real world.

Enjoy a cup of coffee on the porch or make breakfast in bed to relish the final moments of your North Georgia getaway and the sweet memories made with your significant other. Though all good times must come to an end, make sure to use your Guest Loyalty points to start planning your next romantic vacation in the mountains!
title: Romantic Couples Trip in Blue Ridge, GA
